prompt_preview: Inspect a hosted Phosphene session handoff without putting graph content in the URL.

graph.prompt: Inspect a hosted Phosphene session handoff without putting graph content in the URL.

rootNode.label: HOSTED SESSION
rootNode.content: A hosted session marker can point to a portable Reasoning Lab bundle without serializing graph content into the share URL.
rootNode.summary: Hosted marker references a portable bundle

children.label: GUARDRAIL
children.content: The bundle still passes the portable session schema and secret-like-content checks before it can become active.
